title: Rest Filipino Shaggy Pilaf
description: A briny, shaggy weeknight Filipino dish featuring cumin, perfect for satvik-friendly meal options.

ingredients.name: Dried cumin seeds
ingredients.notes: toasted cumin seeds for added flavor

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: sliced and toasted for added flavor

instructions: Heat 2 cups of vegetable broth and 2 cups of water in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add 1 teaspoon of dried cumin seeds and toast for 1 minute.
Add 1 teaspoon of salt and 1/2 teaspoon of black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of brown rice and stir to combine with the broth and spices.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
While the rice cooks, toast 1-inch piece of ginger in a dry skillet over medium heat for 2-3 minutes or until fragrant.
Chop 1/4 cup of fresh cilantro for garnish.
Once the rice is cooked, fluff it with a fork and stir in the toasted ginger and chopped cilantro.
Serve the Rest Filipino Shaggy Pilaf hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
Enjoy your delicious and easy meal!
